name: Chris Benoit
title: Chris Benoit - taken around 6/17/2007 committed suicide a week later 6/24/2007, 40
description: Chris Benoit - taken around 6/17/2007 committed suicide a week later 6/24/2007, 40
bio: Chris Benoit was a Canadian professional wrestler known for his technical skill and intensity. He held world championships in both WWE and WCW during his two-decade career.
